scripts.prod: test -f env/.env && nohup bun --env-file=env/.env src/index.tsx > bun.log 2>&1 &
scripts.docker:up: test -f env/.env && docker compose -f src/db/compose.yml --env-file env/.env up -d
scripts.docker:down: test -f env/.env && docker compose -f src/db/compose.yml --env-file env/.env down
scripts.docker:logs: test -f env/.env && docker compose -f src/db/compose.yml --env-file env/.env logs -f
scripts.docker:delete: test -f env/.env && docker compose -f src/db/compose.yml --env-file env/.env down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans
scripts.db:seed:all: test -f env/.env && bun run db:seed src/db/seed_rewards.sql && bun run db:seed src/db/seed_insignias.sql && bun run db:seed src/db/seed_ranking.sql && bun run db:seed src/db/seed_pevs.sql
